modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Delay when opening All Docs drawer in Perceptive Content.

full_description_text: So, the user was trying to open the All Docs drawer in Perceptive Content. But instead of just showing the contents, it starts searching and that takes time. They want it to just open blank like the other drawers do, you know? It’s causing a bit of a hassle with the delays every time they access it.
short_description: Delay when opening All Docs drawer in Perceptive Content.
description: So, the user was trying to open the All Docs drawer in Perceptive Content. But instead of just showing the contents, it starts searching and that takes time. They want it to just open blank like the other drawers do, you know? It’s causing a bit of a hassle with the delays every time they access it.
